## Example Report Submission Details

Please provide the following details about the report you are submitting to the [Report Gallery](https://github.com/Savior-Systems/OpenGrowth/tree/main/examples/report-gallery):

- **Target / Source URL**: (e.g. `https://example.com` or `https://flowpilot.io`)
- **Demo / Business Context**: (Describe the business summary, target audience, and pain points used for the audit)
- **Data Publicly Accessible**: [ ] Yes / [ ] No (Is the source website publicly viewable?)
- **Anonymization Check**: [ ] I have verified that all sensitive data, API keys, credentials, client names, and non-public identifiers have been completely removed or replaced with fictional details in accordance with our [anonymization guidance](https://github.com/Savior-Systems/OpenGrowth/tree/main/examples/report-gallery/README.md).

## Contributed Artifacts
Please confirm which files you have packaged in your PR:
- [ ] `scorecard.json`
- [ ] `report.md`
- [ ] `report.html`
- [ ] `page-data.json`
- [ ] `rule-results.json`
- [ ] `content-strategy.json`
- [ ] `content-strategy.md`
- [ ] `ad-strategy.json`
- [ ] `ad-strategy.md`

## Screenshots
Please attach any screenshots of the CLI running or the HTML report output.
